description: Download an encrypted blob by ID

main.description: Fetch an encrypted blob from the blob store. Returns raw encrypted bytes (application/octet-stream). Only active members of the blob's conversation can download it.

errors.name: BlobNotFound
errors.description: Blob does not exist or has expired/been deleted

errors.name: NotAMember
errors.description: Requester is not an active member of the blob's conversation
